nameWrapperSpacing.detail: Name wrapper div at TeamMemberCPT.tsx line 148: className="text-header-3 flex gap-2 flex-wrap". Uses flex layout with gap-2 (0.5rem) between the two RichText spans, plus flex-wrap for overflow safety on narrow widths.

richTextMinWidth.detail: Both name RichText fields have className="inline-block min-w-[6rem]" ensuring a clickable target area even when the field is empty.
